description: Draft of a legal testimony. Involves someone who lives in Damsīs, a woman named [...] bt. Ghulayb, someone who defamed her (shanaʿahā), and "standing before her mother's husband" (in the margin). The name Ghulayb may be deleted and replaced with Thābit.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
